creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for for the report,

How could you I reproduce the problem? Could you attach a screenshot?

An effort to import a new TUI library is in progress, could you run a test?
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2021-December/000672.html
('% ./sade' should open the disk layout section).
